channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Cody Johnson Gets Real About His Stagecoach Main Stage Debut & Breaking Records | Billboard News
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard. Today, we're shining the spotlight on a country music star who's taking the world by storm. Cody Johnson, the small-town Texas boy, has come a long way. Let's dive into his incredible journey."
[Soft music transitions]
Host: "Cody Johnson has gone from humble beginnings in Texas to breaking attendance records at the prestigious Houston Rodeo. That's right, folks, this talented artist has been making waves in the country music scene, and his fans can't get enough."
[Upbeat music kicks in]
Host: "And if that's not enough, Cody Johnson is set to make his main stage debut at Stagecoach 2026. This is a huge milestone for any artist, and we can't wait to see what he has in store for us."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today, folks. Cody Johnson is definitely one to watch. Stay tuned for more updates on this rising star, and we'll catch you on the next episode of Trending on Billboard."
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
